held_out_queries: What share of submissions does CA accept, and does everything get full peer review or is there a screening step first?
Is CA open access? If my funder mandates OA, can I comply without a fee?
How many issues per year, and roughly how many major articles per issue?

edits.summary: Add selectivity + review filter (~230 mss/yr, ~50% full peer review, ~10% accepted; 2023 operating figures flagged 需复核), the issue cadence (6 core + 1 OA supplementary; 5-6 major articles/core issue), and the OA tier structure (green OA for all, gold OA for qualifying funders, one editor-selected OA article/issue). Sharpened the CA Treatment definition. APC/editors left as live-check.
edits.gate_reason: strict improvement 55 -> 100; judge confirmed zero wrong facts; year-dependent rates carried their 需复核 caveat
